/builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/bin/regression/daily/stage1-ue-regression-master.xml 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "https://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd">
<suite thread-count="1" parallel="tests" data-provider-thread-count="4" name="Stage1 UE Regression Master Suite" guice-stage="DEVELOPMENT" verbose="4">
  <listeners>
    <listener class-name="core.listener.PrimeResourceManager"/>
  </listeners>
  <suite-files>
    <suite-file path="universal-enrollment-stage1.xml"/>
  </suite-files>
</suite> <!-- Stage1 UE Regression Master Suite -->
/builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/bin/regression/daily/universal-enrollment-stage1.xml 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "https://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd">
<suite thread-count="1" parallel="tests" data-provider-thread-count="3" name="Universal Enrollment Regression Test Suite - Stage1 Environment" guice-stage="DEVELOPMENT" verbose="4">
  <listeners>
    <listener class-name="core.listener.PrimeResourceManager"/>
  </listeners>
  <test thread-count="1" parallel="tests" name="NYD_Standard_Individual_Enrollment" verbose="4">
    <parameter name="features" value="frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentPositive.feature"/>
    <parameter name="traunch" value="nyd"/>
    <parameter name="tags" value="@regression and @dailyrun"/>
    <classes>
      <class name="core.runner.ParallelFeatureRunner"/>
    </classes>
  </test> <!-- NYD_Standard_Individual_Enrollment -->
  <test thread-count="1" parallel="tests" name="MDD_Standard_Individual_Enrollment" verbose="4">
    <parameter name="features" value="frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentPositive.feature"/>
    <parameter name="traunch" value="mdd"/>
    <parameter name="tags" value="@regression and @dailyrun"/>
    <classes>
      <class name="core.runner.ParallelFeatureRunner"/>
    </classes>
  </test> <!-- MDD_Standard_Individual_Enrollment -->
  <test thread-count="1" parallel="tests" name="NMD_Standard_Individual_Enrollment" verbose="4">
    <parameter name="features" value="frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentPositive.feature"/>
    <parameter name="traunch" value="nmd"/>
    <parameter name="tags" value="@regression and @dailyrun"/>
    <classes>
      <class name="core.runner.ParallelFeatureRunner"/>
    </classes>
  </test> <!-- NMD_Standard_Individual_Enrollment -->
  <test thread-count="1" parallel="tests" name="IDD_Standard_Individual_Enrollment" verbose="4">

    <parameter name="traunch" value="idd"/>

    <parameter name="traunch" value="nyd"/>

 Executing query:
 select branding from tu_traunch where voucher_prefix = upper('nyd') and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'newyork' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'newyork' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Traunch for Single Universal Enrollment using Bank Funding with Enrollment of Individual Account with KIS and One-Time Bank and Recurring Contrib Option is nyd
 Executing query:
 SELECT Min(calendar_date) FROM tu_calendar WHERE calendar_date <= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 4 and calendar_date >= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 1 AND stock_flag = 'N' AND holiday_flag = 'N'
 With bindings (in order): 07052026; 07052026

 Executing query:
 select branding from tu_traunch where voucher_prefix = upper('mdd') and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'mddirect' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'mddirect' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Traunch for Single Universal Enrollment using Bank Funding with Enrollment of Individual Account with KIS and One-Time Bank Contribution Option and Bene edit DOB is mdd
 Executing query:
 SELECT Min(calendar_date) FROM tu_calendar WHERE calendar_date <= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 4 and calendar_date >= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 1 AND stock_flag = 'N' AND holiday_flag = 'N'
 With bindings (in order): 07052026; 07052026

 Query executed

 Executing query:
 select branding from tu_traunch where voucher_prefix = upper('nmd') and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'nmdirect' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'nmdirect' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'idaho' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'

 Query executed

 SELECT tl.USERNAME as USERNAME, ta.NV_KICKSTART_PARTICIPATION FROM TU_PERSON tp, TU_MEMBER tm, TU_ACCT ta, TU_BENE tb ,TA_LOGIN tl,TA_APP_CONTEXT tac where ta.UII_MEMBER_ID = tm.UII_MEMBER_ID and ta.SEQ_PART_ID = tp.SEQ_PERSON_ID and ta.SEQ_BENE_ID = tb.SEQ_BENE_ID and tm.UII_MEMBER_ID = tac.APP_MEMBER_ID and tac.LOGIN_ID = tl.LOGIN_ID AND tl.USERNAME = 'QAAUTOTEST_UE_927989150'

 Executing query:
 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'missouri' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'missouri' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentPositiveOhio.feature
 Starting scenario: Single Universal Enrollment with Enrollment of Individual Account with BYO Option
 Executing query:
 select branding from tu_traunch where voucher_prefix = upper('ohd') and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'ohio' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'ohio' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Traunch for Single Universal Enrollment with Enrollment of Individual Account with BYO Option is ohd
 Executing query:
 SELECT Min(calendar_date) FROM tu_calendar WHERE calendar_date <= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 4 and calendar_date >= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 1 AND stock_flag = 'N' AND holiday_flag = 'N'
 With bindings (in order): 07052026; 07052026

 Executing query:
 SELECT tp.FIRST_NAME as FIRSTNAME,tp.LAST_NAME as LASTNAME, tp.PERM_ADDLINE1 as P_ADDR1,tp.PERM_CITY as P_CITY, tp.PERM_ZIPCODE as P_ZIP, tb.FIRST_NAME as BFIRSTNAME, tb.LAST_NAME as BLASTNAME, tm.EMAIL as EMAIL,tl.USERNAME as USERNAME FROM TU_PERSON tp, TU_MEMBER tm, TU_ACCT ta, TU_BENE tb ,TA_LOGIN tl,TA_APP_CONTEXT tac ,TU_LOYALTY_LINK tll where ta.UII_MEMBER_ID = tm.UII_MEMBER_ID and ta.SEQ_PART_ID = tp.SEQ_PERSON_ID and ta.SEQ_BENE_ID = tb.SEQ_BENE_ID and tm.UII_MEMBER_ID = tac.APP_MEMBER_ID and tll.ACCT_ID = (TA.UII_ACCT_ID||TA.UII_ACCT_EXT) and tac.LOGIN_ID = tl.LOGIN_ID and tm.EMAIL = 'upromise357510@ascensus.com' and tl.USERNAME = 'QAAUTOTEST_UE_657347579'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:

 SELECT tp.FIRST_NAME as FIRSTNAME,tp.LAST_NAME as LASTNAME, tp.PERM_ADDLINE1 as P_ADDR1,tp.PERM_CITY as P_CITY, tp.PERM_ZIPCODE as P_ZIP, tb.FIRST_NAME as BFIRSTNAME, tb.LAST_NAME as BLASTNAME, tm.EMAIL as EMAIL,tl.USERNAME as USERNAME FROM TU_PERSON tp, TU_MEMBER tm, TU_ACCT ta, TU_BENE tb ,TA_LOGIN tl,TA_APP_CONTEXT tac ,TU_LOYALTY_LINK tll where ta.UII_MEMBER_ID = tm.UII_MEMBER_ID and ta.SEQ_PART_ID = tp.SEQ_PERSON_ID and ta.SEQ_BENE_ID = tb.SEQ_BENE_ID and tm.UII_MEMBER_ID = tac.APP_MEMBER_ID and tll.ACCT_ID = (TA.UII_ACCT_ID||TA.UII_ACCT_EXT) and tac.LOGIN_ID = tl.LOGIN_ID and tm.EMAIL = 'upromise241325@ascensus.com' and tl.USERNAME = 'QAAUTOTEST_UE_611240004'

 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'patap' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'

 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'northdakota' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'

 select branding from tu_traunch where voucher_prefix = upper('dcd') and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'dcdirect' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'dcdirect' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 Starting scenario: Single Universal Enrollment using ILFirst Step with check Funding with Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of non IL resident with check
 Executing query:
 select branding from tu_traunch where voucher_prefix = upper('ild') and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 select traunch_id plan_id, voucher_prefix plan_prefix, state plan_state, uuid_traunch_id plan_uuid, product_type plan_type, backend_type plan_backend, name plan_name from tu_traunch where branding = 'ildirect' and ctl_rec_stat = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Executing query:
 SELECT listagg(f.fund_id, ';') within group (ORDER BY f.fund_id) funds FROM tu_traunch_fund tf, tu_funds f, tu_traunch t WHERE t.branding = 'ildirect' and t.traunch_id = tf.traunch_id and tf.fund_id = f.fund_id and f.ctl_rec_stat = 'A' and f.back_status = 'A' and f.web_status = 'A'
 Schema: null
 Query executed
 Traunch for Single Universal Enrollment using ILFirst Step with check Funding with Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of non IL resident with check is ild
 Executing query:
 SELECT Min(calendar_date) FROM tu_calendar WHERE calendar_date <= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 4 and calendar_date >= To_Date(?, 'MMDDYYYY') + 1 AND stock_flag = 'N' AND holiday_flag = 'N'
 With bindings (in order): 07052026; 07052026

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentFirstStepSubBene.feature

load test cases (PASSED)
starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): njd

runScenario("Sub Bene Enrollment using rollover with Sub bene Enrollment with with IL First Step with parent of ...)
Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentFirstStepSubBene.feature
 Starting scenario: Sub Bene Enrollment using rollover with Sub bene Enrollment with with IL First Step with parent of IL resident with rollover
 Traunch for Sub Bene Enrollment using rollover with Sub bene Enrollment with with IL First Step with parent of IL resident with rollover is njd
load test cases (PASSED)
starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): njd
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): njd

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentFirstStepSubBene.feature
 Starting scenario: Sub Bene Enrollment using rollover with Sub bene Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of non IL resident of adopted child with rollover
 Traunch for Sub Bene Enrollment using rollover with Sub bene Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of non IL resident of adopted child with rollover is njd
load test cases (PASSED)
starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): njd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Web Registered Automation UE account details from database for Sub bene Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of non IL resident of adopted child with rollover (PASSED)

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentFirstStepSubBene.feature
 Starting scenario: Sub Bene Enrollment using rollover with Sub bene Enrollment with with IL First Step with parent of IL resident with rollover
 Traunch for Sub Bene Enrollment using rollover with Sub bene Enrollment with with IL First Step with parent of IL resident with rollover is nyd

starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nyd
 Schema: null
 Query executed

Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentFirstStepSubBene.feature
 Starting scenario: Sub Bene Enrollment using Bank with Sub bene Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of non IL resident with bank
 Traunch for Sub Bene Enrollment using Bank with Sub bene Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of non IL resident with bank is nyd
load test cases (PASSED)
starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nyd
 Schema: null
 Query executed

 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nyd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
get Web Registered Automation UE account details from database for Sub bene Enrollment of Account with IL First Step with parent of IL resident of adopted child with bank (PASSED)

runScenario("Sub Bene Enrollment using Bank with Sub bene Enrollment with BYO and One-Time Bank and Recurring Co...)
Starting scenario file: /builds/ascensus-gs/products/depot/qa-automation/prime-test-automation/unite/unite-universal-enrollment/src/test/resources/testsuite/frontoffice/enrollment/common/feature/UniversalEnrollmentSubBene.feature
 Starting scenario: Sub Bene Enrollment using Bank with Sub bene Enrollment with BYO and One-Time Bank and Recurring Contrib Option
 Traunch for Sub Bene Enrollment using Bank with Sub bene Enrollment with BYO and One-Time Bank and Recurring Contrib Option is nmd
load test cases (PASSED)
starting "login" URL for "member" (PASSED)
 Obtaining browser from resource manager
using browser (PASSED)
 Executing query:
 SELECT A.uii_acct_id || A.uii_acct_ext AS accountid, M.email AS email, L.username AS username, 'Newton@123' as password, tp.LAST_4_SSN as last_4ssn FROM tu_acct A INNER JOIN tu_traunch T ON T.traunch_id = A.traunch_id INNER JOIN tu_member M ON M.uii_member_id = A.uii_member_id INNER JOIN tu_person tp ON a.seq_part_id = tp.seq_person_id INNER JOIN ta_app_context ac ON ac.app_member_id = M.uii_member_id INNER JOIN ta_login L ON L.login_id = ac.login_id WHERE A.acct_state = '91' AND M.web_registered = 'Y' AND A.uii_acct_ext = '01' AND (M.web_access <> 'D' OR M.web_access IS NULL) AND UPPER(T.voucher_prefix) = UPPER(?) AND UPPER(L.username) LIKE UPPER('QAAUTOTEST%') AND M.TWOFACTOR_OPTIN = 'S' AND M.TWOFACTOR_INTST_FLAG IS NULL ORDER BY A.uii_acct_id DESC, A.uii_acct_ext DESC, L.login_id DESC FETCH NEXT 1 ROW ONLY
 With bindings (in order): nmd
 Schema: null
 Query executed
